hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(i.tool_input||{}).command||'';if(!cmd.match(/^git push/)){process.exit(0);}const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const r=spawnSync('npm',['run','lint'],{cwd:'app',stdio:'inherit',shell:true});if(r.status!==0){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({continue:false,stopReason:'Lint failed — fix errors before pushing.'}));}process.exit(0);})"
